title: I'm Not a Supermouse!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Bruce trains scaredy-mouse Geronimo through desert, poles, jungle and caves — and he learns he's no supermouse, just brave! 💪

q.en: At the start of the story, where did Geronimo get stuck?
q.zh: 故事开头，杰罗尼摩被困在了什么地方？

options.en: In the elevator of the public library
In his office at the newspaper according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 报社办公室里（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The elevator in the New Mouse City Public Library stopped between floors on a Saturday, trapping Geronimo in the dark.
explain.zh: 周六那天，鼠城公共图书馆的电梯在楼层间停住，把杰罗尼摩困在了黑暗里。

q.en: Who rescued Geronimo from the stuck elevator?
q.zh: 是谁把杰罗尼摩从卡住的电梯里救出来的？

explain.en: Bruce Hyena answered Geronimo's phone call and arrived to pry the elevator doors open.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯·海纳接到了杰罗尼摩的电话，赶来把电梯门撬开救了他。

q.en: What is Bruce's golden Rule No. 1 for survival?
q.zh: 布鲁斯的黄金生存法则第一条是什么？

explain.en: Bruce's four rules begin with 'Rule No. 1: ALWAYS KEEP CALM!' which he teaches through the desert tests.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯的四条法则以‘第一条：始终保持冷静！’开头，他通过沙漠测验向杰罗尼摩传授这些道理。

q.en: Which desert did Bruce take Geronimo to first for training?
q.zh: 布鲁斯先把杰罗尼摩带到了哪片沙漠训练？

options.en: The Antarctic according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 南极洲（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Bruce flew Geronimo to the Sahara, describing it as a huge, hot, dry place with lots of camels.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯把杰罗尼摩空运到撒哈拉，说那里又大又热又干，还有很多骆驼。

q.en: In Real Mouse Test No. 1, what did Bruce use to scare Geronimo?
q.zh: 在‘真老鼠测验第一关’里，布鲁斯拿什么吓唬杰罗尼摩？

options.en: A rubber snake according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一条橡胶蛇（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Bruce dangled a 'scorpion' in Geronimo's face, then revealed it was made of rubber to teach Rule No. 1: keep calm.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯把一只‘蝎子’在杰罗尼摩面前晃，随后说明那是橡胶做的，以此教第一条法则：保持冷静。

q.en: In Test No. 5, what did Geronimo dive into to escape the angry bees?
q.zh: 在第五关测验里，杰罗尼摩跳进什么里面躲开愤怒的蜜蜂？

options.en: A mountain lake according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座山间湖泊（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: After Bruce shook the bees' nest onto his head, Geronimo ran to the pond in the middle of the oasis and dove in.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯把蜂巢摇到他头上后，杰罗尼摩跑到绿洲中央的水塘，一头扎了进去。

q.en: How many miles did they pull the sled to reach the North Pole?
q.zh: 他们拉雪橇走了多少英里才到达北极？

explain.en: Bruce said they would pull sleds for a good hundred miles until the GPS told them they had hit the North Pole.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯说他们要拉雪橇走足足一百英里，直到导航显示抵达北极为止。

q.en: In the jungle, who mistook Geronimo for her own baby?
q.zh: 在丛林里，谁把杰罗尼摩当成了自己的宝宝？

options.en: A hungry tiger according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只饥饿的老虎（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: An orangutan mother plucked Geronimo from the tree and rocked him, thinking he was one of her babies.
explain.zh: 一只猩猩妈妈把杰罗尼摩从树上抱下来轻轻摇晃，以为他是自己的宝宝。

q.en: In the dark cave, how did Bruce finally find Geronimo?
q.zh: 在漆黑的洞穴里，布鲁斯最后是怎么找到杰罗尼摩的？

explain.en: Geronimo sang his 'I'm a Calm Mouse' song; Bruce heard him singing and found him in the dark.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩唱起了那首《我是只冷静鼠》的歌，布鲁斯循着歌声在黑暗中找到了他。

q.en: What disaster back home made Geronimo organize volunteer relief?
q.zh: 回到家乡后，是什么灾害让杰罗尼摩组织志愿者去救援？

options.en: A storm near Blue Dolphin Bay
options.zh: 蓝海豚湾附近的一场风暴

options.en: A fire at the newspaper according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 报社的一场火灾（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A major storm hit the northern part of Mouse Island near Blue Dolphin Bay, and Mayor Ratmouse asked Geronimo for help.
explain.zh: 一场大风暴袭击了鼠岛北部蓝海豚湾附近的区域，老鼠市长向杰罗尼摩求助。
